\tzpentry{ID3747}{Text Fiber Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3747 introduces Text Fiber Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\hat{U}_{\\text{fiber}}^{(k)}(s) = \\begin{cases}\n e^{i\\phi_0} \\hat{I} & \\text{if } s = |\\uparrow\\rangle \\\\\n e^{i(\\phi_0 + \\pi)} \\hat{I} & \\text{if } s = |\\downarrow\\rangle\n \\end{cases}$$
